selection_without_outcomes.economic_reason: VVIX rising faster than VIX indicates increasing demand for volatility convexity and tail hedges, favoring broad SPY; equality or a declining VVIX/VIX ratio favors growth-heavy QQQ
selection_without_outcomes.independent_mechanism_statement: the signal uses a fixed official Cboe VVIX/VIX convexity ratio change and contains no VXN, absolute VVIX change, price, volume, own-price trend, return rank, moving average, reversal, realized volatility, skewness, expected-shortfall, macro input, GLD or cash gate; correlated option-risk ancestry with C38 and C39 is disclosed and statistical independence is not claimed

signal.source: exact already-retained official Cboe VVIX_History.csv and VIX_History.csv bytes
signal.formula: on the newest common positive finite VVIX and VIX observation on or before month-end, compute VVIX/VIX; compare with the newest common observation on or before 28 calendar days earlier
signal.target_rule: strict VVIX/VIX ratio increase means SPY weight 1.0; equality or decrease means QQQ weight 1.0
signal.availability_rule: retrospective-secondary only; signal rows end at the final common source session no later than the frozen month-end decision cutoff
signal.missing_rule: fail closed on missing common observations or nonpositive/nonfinite VVIX or VIX; no alternate lookback, level threshold, VXN, SKEW, smoothing, winsorization, persistence, price/volume/trend overlay, macro combination or source blend
signal.ancestry_limitation: static official Cboe histories are retrospective and do not establish historical publication-vintage correctness, so any pass remains retrospective secondary evidence only

timing_and_account.signal_freeze: 20:05 America/New_York after the final accepted XNYS close preceding the next monthly execution session
timing_and_account.target_submission: 09:00 America/New_York on the next accepted XNYS session
timing_and_account.holding: until the following monthly accepted execution open
timing_and_account.decision_price: raw preceding-session close for each asset, available before target submission
timing_and_account.comparator: 50/50 SPY/QQQ rebalanced at identical monthly opens under identical whole-share, cost, calendar, lifecycle and corporate-action accounting

splits.cross_boundary_rule: no signal or portfolio state carries across splits

state_support_before_outcomes.minimums: 20 intervals, four of each state, and two transitions in each direction per split

gates: strategy terminal net wealth strictly above the 50/50 comparator
arithmetic mean paired monthly active return strictly positive
strategy maximum drawdown no worse than the 50/50 comparator
validation.failure_rule: holdout remains unopened and the lineage closes permanently

gates: strategy terminal net wealth strictly above the 50/50 comparator
strategy maximum drawdown no worse than the 50/50 comparator
uncentered type-7 0.05 lower bound strictly positive

bootstrap.method: paired circular moving-block bootstrap over monthly active returns
bootstrap.p_value: (1 + centered-null means at least observed mean)/(100000 + 1)
bootstrap.limitation: the three-month block is an outcome-blind dependence assumption, not proof of complete serial-dependence coverage

source_identities.runner_role: branch-only removable one-use research adapter; not shared infrastructure
